name: Rolls from Sourdough Starter
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry ingredients in a large bowl, mixing well.
2. Stir in the sourdough starter and vegetable oil until combined.
3. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface.
4. Knead the dough until smooth and elastic, about 8-10 minutes.
5. Shape the dough into 2-inch balls.
6. Place the balls in a greased pan.
7. Let the dough rise, covered, for 30-40 minutes.
8. Bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-17 minutes.
Source: Fannie Johnson, Brownwood, Abilene Reporter-News 9/17/94
